Description: Fungal disease causing leaf spots and fruit blemishes.
Treatment: Apply fungicides like Captan or Mancozeb. Remove fallen leaves and prune infected branches.
Prevention: Avoid overhead watering, remove fallen leaves, prune regularly

Description: Fungal infection that causes rotting in apples and leaves.
Treatment: Use fungicides like Thiophanate-methyl. Prune infected parts and remove mummified fruits.
Prevention: Remove and destroy infected fruits, sanitize pruning tools

Description: Rust fungus requiring both apple and cedar hosts.
Treatment: Apply myclobutanil or other fungicides during early growth. Remove nearby cedar trees if possible.
Prevention: Avoid planting apple trees near cedar trees

Description: Gray spots on leaves caused by Cercospora fungus.
Treatment: Use resistant hybrids. Apply fungicides like strobilurins during early symptoms.
Prevention: Practice crop rotation and use resistant hybrids

Description: Rusty pustules on corn leaves caused by Puccinia fungus.
Treatment: Use resistant varieties. Apply fungicides like Difenoconazole if severe.
Prevention: Avoid high humidity, plant resistant varieties

Description: Fungal disease affecting grape leaves, stems, and fruits.
Treatment: Use fungicides like Mancozeb. Prune infected vines and ensure good air circulation.
Prevention: Ensure proper spacing and pruning, remove mummified berries

Description: Fungal disease causing concentric spots on leaves.
Treatment: Apply chlorothalonil or mancozeb. Rotate crops and remove debris.
Prevention: Rotate crops, use certified seed potatoes

Description: Serious disease causing leaf and tuber decay.
Treatment: Use fungicides like Metalaxyl. Destroy infected plants and avoid overhead watering.
Duration: Rapid spread, full control may take weeks
Prevention: Avoid overhead watering, destroy infected plants promptly

Description: Bacterial disease causing spots on leaves and fruits.
Treatment: Use copper-based bactericides. Remove infected leaves and avoid wet foliage.
Prevention: Avoid working with wet plants, use pathogen-free seeds

Description: Fungal disease causing brown leaf spots.
Treatment: Apply fungicides like Azoxystrobin. Rotate crops and use resistant varieties.
Prevention: Mulch base, rotate crops, water at soil level

Description: Devastating fungal disease leading to plant collapse.
Treatment: Use fungicides like chlorothalonil. Remove infected plants and control humidity.
Prevention: Remove infected plants, avoid overhead watering

Description: Fungal infection forming mold under tomato leaves.
Treatment: Ensure good ventilation. Apply fungicides like mancozeb or copper sprays.
Prevention: Improve air circulation, avoid wet foliage

Treatment: Use fungicides like chlorothalonil. Remove infected leaves and avoid wetting foliage.
Prevention: Remove lower infected leaves, water early in the day

Description: Fungal infection with concentric ring spots.
Treatment: Apply Difenoconazole-based fungicides. Improve field hygiene and airflow.
Prevention: Keep foliage dry, maintain plant spacing

Description: Viral disease spread by whiteflies, causing curled leaves and stunted growth.
Treatment: Control whiteflies using neem oil or insecticides. Use resistant varieties.
Prevention: Use netting to block whiteflies, control weed hosts

Description: Viral infection causing mottling and deformation.
Treatment: Remove infected plants. Disinfect tools and avoid tobacco use near plants.
Prevention: Disinfect tools, avoid handling after using tobacco

Description: Pest infestation causing webbing and yellowing.
Treatment: Use miticides or neem oil. Wash off mites and maintain humidity.
